title: SoreAss
description:
Un modpack que hice para jugar con mis amigos :) esta totalmente traducido al español.
A modpack I made to play with my friends :) It has been totally translated to spanish.
body:
# SoreAss
This is a modpack I made for **my friends** to play minecraft together. Thank you to the people behind [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), I used their modpack as the baseline and build from there.
Besides that there are several mods that I patched myself be so to work together or to support **Spanish** _(yeah, the modpack is in **Spanish** by default)_; all that said, the rights of these modified mods goes to their rightful owners. _(please don't sue me)_

### BTW
This was the modpack used for the **_"Espinoverse"_** series on Twitch. If you want me to make a modpack for a project of yours, contact me at my email TheLegendofSaram@gmail.com
